/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/controller/HandTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/core/Frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/core/Hand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/gesture/GestureDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/input/LeapAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/input/LeapConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/interaction/InteractionEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leap.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o leap  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/aysunsuleymanturk/Desktop/LeapMotion/external/ultraleap/lib /Users/aysunsuleymanturk/Desktop/LeapMotion/external/ultraleap/lib/libLeapC.dylib -framework ApplicationServices -framework CoreFoundation
